description: Secure the 'SecretDiary' app by implementing biometric authentication. Currently, the Login button immediately opens the DiaryActivity, which is insecure. Update the application to use the 'androidx.biometric:biometric' library (version 1.2.0-alpha05) to ensure that clicking the login button triggers a BiometricPrompt. The prompt must be configured with the title 'Biometric Login' and negative button text 'Cancel'. Navigation to DiaryActivity must only occur after a successful authentication callback.
